meaning: n.新闻记者,新闻工作者,办报人,经营报业者
examples: I've been a newspaperman all my adult life.
He thought himself only a hard-boiled newspaperman.
A newspaperman wants my present address.
He's a smart and tough newspaperman who originally came into this business as a media lawyer.
His mother, Emmie, was a pianist and his father, Malcolm Johnson, a newspaperman.
